history.note: Created. Pre-staged perf optimization task: replace gather-to-main-device MUL_MAT_ID fallback (from PR #2) with per-device row-slice routing. Target: 2x layer-split baseline (40 t/s). Will dispatch when the second orchestrator returns confirming slow gen.
Both rowsplit-fix orchestrators returned confirming 0.5 t/s on PR #2's gather-to-main impl. Per user pre-dispatch directive, dispatching this perf task now.
Beginning design consult with codex on ggml_cuda_op_mul_mat cuda_split aggregation pattern before drafting plan.

Plan written after 3 codex design consults. Approach: targeted MMVQ split fast path (expert-range guard in mul_mat_vec_q kernel only). Whole-expert aligned splits only; else gather fallback. ~150-200 LOC. Codex consult outputs: /tmp/v4-rowsplit-perf/design-consult-{1,2,3}-output.txt

REQUEST_CHANGES round 1. Blockers: (a) eligibility predicate (use dst->ne[2]==1 + get_mmvq_mmid_max_batch + ne[3]==1), (b) root-coordinate alignment documentation, (c) CUDA graph claim correction, (d) runtime verification hook. /tmp/v4-rowsplit-perf/plan-review-output.txt
Plan revised: all 4 blockers addressed. Added root-coordinate section, fixed eligibility predicate, added GGML_CUDA_DSV4_MMID_TRACE hook, corrected graph-capture claim.
APPROVE round 2. All blockers addressed. One non-blocker note: summary line ne12 fixed. /tmp/v4-rowsplit-perf/plan-review-2-output.txt
